rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM H BRADLEY VS. DOLMEN PROPERTY GROUP LLC A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Dolmen Property Group Llc'S Motion For Filing Documents And Evidence Under Seal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 9, 2019 line 1. Defendant Dolmen Property Group Llc'S Motion For Filing Documents And Evidence Under Seal Hearing Required. Parties to address why each document is subject to sealing, including publicly recorded documents, pictures or open spaces, etc. Further, opposing party to provide information, if available, as to the number of other cases in which the PSA agreement has been used and whether in all of those cases it was subject to sealing. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: LESLIE YOUNG VS. CANDACE CROCKETT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 9, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT CANDACE CROCKETT DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to allege facts supporting each element of this cause of action, including facts giving rise to the belief to support allegations "on information and belief." Defendant's counsel shall properly comply with the meet and confer provisions in the future. New round of meet and confer efforts is required for each iteration of the pleadings. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: RODY B. LEANO VS. ILDELIZA TORRES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of Judgment For Monetary Damages
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 9, 2019 line 5. PLAINTIFF RODY LEANO Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of Judgment For Monetary Damages is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. A money judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant shall be entered for the unlawful detainer damages in the amount of $21,448.02 and for the enforcement attorney's fees in the amount of $1,750. Request for entry of judgment refunding $22,000 payment is DENIED. Neither the unlawful detainer procedure nor the settlement agreement provide for recovery of this amount on a motion in this action. This denial is without prejudice for Plaintiff to file a separate action. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DEFU LU ET AL VS. RIU JUN LU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 9, 2019 line 6. PLAINTIFF DEFU LU, GUNG-MEI CHAO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Motion For Summary Adjudication As a preliminary matter Defendant's Second Amended Opposition and Separate Statement of Additional Material Facts are stricken. Defendant did not obtain permission to file a second amended opposition. The Court allowed the Defendant to provide evidentiary support for his then operative opposition and to file an amended response to Plaintiff's Separate Statement. Based on the moving papers, opposition papers filed on August 14, 2019, authorized supplemental filings dates August 26, 2019, and reply, the Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Plaintiff's motion is not a motion for reconsideration. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that Plaintiff's ability to create a triable issue of fact in response to Defendant's motion for summary judgement transforms Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment into a motion for reconsideration. On Plaintiff's motion for summary judgment Defendant has an independent burden to create a triable issue of fact. Defendant failed to do so as to the sole argument raised in opposition, bona fide intent. Plaintiff's have shifted their burden, and under Drouet Defendant has to at least show evidence of retaliation to shift the burden back. Even assuming that the burden was shifted back to Plaintiff, Defendant failed to create a triable issue of fact and provide any evidence of lack of bona fide intent to remove this building from the rental market. = (501/CFH)
